surfaced_from: PWA request 2026-05-25 05:19 UTC — CISSP-like CTO security audit and prioritization
details: Non-root audit could not verify effective sshd settings or fail2ban jail status. Readable config shows X11Forwarding yes; SSH listens publicly on IPv4 and IPv6. Fail2ban is running as a service, but status requires root. Effective PasswordAuthentication, PermitRootLogin, MaxAuthTries, AllowUsers, and forwarding settings need root-level confirmation before claiming the host is hardened.
search_trail: Ran openclaw status and openclaw security audit --deep on cto-v1; result: 0 critical, 1 warn, 1 info; gateway bound to 127.0.0.1 with token auth.
Ran ss -ltnup on cto-v1; found public SSH plus public HTTP/HTTPS and loopback-only OpenClaw/Hermes/A2A services.
Queried Hetzner API for servers, primary IPs, and firewalls; found no cloud firewalls and multiple public CTO servers/candidates.
Inspected /etc/caddy/Caddyfile without secrets; cto.husband.llc reverse-proxies to 127.0.0.1:8088 with security headers and access logging.
Scanned git history/current tree for secret-shaped patterns and key material; confirmed historical VAPID private key material and multiple documented credential-handling risks.
Checked file permissions for /opt/cto, ~/.openclaw, ~/.hermes, ~/.codex; sensitive home config dirs are mostly 0600/0700, while project files are group-writable by cto group.
Checked unattended-upgrades; service is enabled and active.
Attempted privileged sshd/fail2ban verification; elevated execution is unavailable in this PWA runtime, so privileged SSH posture remains unverified.
proposed_resolution: Run a privileged read-only SSH/fail2ban audit, then harden to key-only, no root login, X11 forwarding off, tight auth retry limits, and source-restricted SSH once firewall/tailnet access is confirmed.
blast_radius: SSH changes can lock out administration if applied before alternate access is verified.
rollback_plan: Keep console access available; test a second SSH session before closing the first; revert sshd_config.d changes if login fails.
resolution_notes: 2026-05-27T07:55Z OpenClaw pump: completed an unprivileged read-only SSH/fail2ban baseline. SSH is active and publicly listening on IPv4/IPv6 port 22; visible sshd config disables keyboard-interactive auth but does not conclusively prove PasswordAuthentication/PermitRootLogin/MaxAuthTries/AllowUsers settings because effective `sshd -T` requires privileged host-key access. fail2ban is active, but jail status requires root. unattended-upgrades is enabled/active; apt updates are pending and belong to BACKLOG-012. Artifact: logs/security/BACKLOG-011-ssh-fail2ban-readonly-verification-2026-05-27T0755Z.md. Item remains open pending approved privileged read-only verification and any access-preserving hardening plan.
